title: ‘Clock is ticking’: Hormuz disruption raises fears of global food crisis
contentSnippet: The clock is ticking for global food systems as disruptions in the Strait of Hormuz threaten to choke off the flow of fuel and crucial fertilizers needed for the next planting season – also raising the risk of higher food prices and a new wave of inflation.&nbsp;

title: Presidente Nayib Bukele inaugura Surf City 2 en el oriente del país
contentSnippet: La nueva iniciativa cuenta con una carretera en Punta Mango, de 13 kilómetros, que conectará con 11 playas entre los departamentos de San Miguel y Usulután.

title: Gobierno cumple a medias exigencias del FMI relacionadas con compras públicas

title: Why India walked away from its bid to host COP33
contentSnippet: India has quietly abandoned its bid to host the UN's top-tier climate conference COP33, marking a shift from PM Narendra Modi's pledge in 2023. Experts and analysts explore what's behind the decision.
